subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of Paradise! The Hidden One hath verily come with the truth, yet the people comprehend not, and He Who was treasured hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه الفردوس ان المکنون اتی بالحق و القوم لایفقهون و المخزون قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
